info.description: OpenAPI projection of the cerebrum pillar's REST contract. Authored as a ts-rest contract (src/contract/rest.ts); consumed directly by polyglot clients and via openapi-typescript by TS consumers.
info.title: @pops/cerebrum

post.summary: Run a chat turn: retrieve context, call the LLM, persist turns.
Create a new conversation.
List conversations (paginated, optional title search).

get.summary: Get a conversation with all its messages.
Return the current context state (scopes, app context, engrams).

post.summary: Replace the active scopes for a conversation.
Run the full document-generation pipeline for any mode.
Dry-run the pipeline: return sources + an outline without synthesis.
Generate a structured report from a query.
Generate a summary digest over a date range.
Generate a chronological timeline from dated engrams.
Create an engram (optionally scaffolded from a template).
List engrams matching the supplied filters, with a total count.
Add scopes to an engram (merged with its existing scopes).
Remove scopes from an engram (rejects removing the last scope).

delete.summary: Archive an engram (soft delete — moves the file under .archive/).

get.summary: Get an engram and its Markdown body.

post.summary: Create a bidirectional link from one engram to another.

delete.summary: Remove the link between two engrams.

post.summary: Query the action audit trail (filtered + paginated).
List glia actions matching the supplied filters (proposal queue + audit trail).

get.summary: Get a single glia action by id.

post.summary: Record a user decision on a pending action; eagerly re-evaluate graduation.
Execute an approved action.
Revert an executed action (DB-state flip + file-level undo).
Generate (and optionally deliver) the autonomous-action digest.

get.summary: List active engrams with no inbound links.

post.summary: Compute the quality score for a single engram.
Compute the staleness score for a single engram.

get.summary: List trust state for every action type.
Get trust state for a single action type.

post.summary: Run the auditor worker (quality, contradiction, coverage-gap).
Run the consolidator worker (similar-engram merge proposals).
Run the linker worker (cross-reference proposals).
Run the pruner worker (staleness + orphan archival proposals).
Diff disk against the index; apply unless dryRun.
Rebuild the engram index from disk; force re-enqueues embeddings.
Scan peer pillars and enqueue embeddings for changed source rows.
Classify content into a known engram type.
Poll the async enrichment state of an engram.
Extract named entities + tags + referenced dates from content.
Infer scopes for content (explicit → rules → LLM → fallback).
Dry-run the ingestion pipeline without writing an engram.
Store a raw capture and enqueue async enrichment.
Re-enqueue the classifyEngram job for an engram.
Run the full ingestion pipeline and write an engram.
List contradiction-pattern nudges with structured evidence.
List nudges matching the supplied filters, with a total count.

get.summary: Get a single nudge by ID.

post.summary: Dismiss a pending nudge.

get.summary: Get a single plexus adapter by id.
List the ingestion filters for an adapter.

post.summary: Atomically replace the ingestion filters for an adapter.
Run an on-demand health check against an adapter.
Trigger a manual ingestion cycle for an adapter.
Shut down and remove an adapter.
Full NL Q&A: scope inference → retrieval → LLM → citation parsing.
Debug: show scope inference + retrieval plan without executing.
Retrieval-only — returns sources without calling the LLM.

get.summary: List reflexes enriched with runtime status.

post.summary: Query the append-only reflex execution log (filtered + paginated).

get.summary: Get a single reflex with its recent execution history.

post.summary: Disable a reflex (rewrites the TOML config).
Enable a reflex (rewrites the TOML config).
Dry-run a reflex, logging a completed test execution.
Assemble a token-budgeted context window for LLM consumption.
Unified search — semantic | structured | hybrid (default).
Find engrams similar to a given engram by its existing vector.

get.summary: Retrieval layer health and coverage counts.
List known scopes with engram counts, optionally filtered by prefix.

post.summary: Return engrams matching scope prefixes (secret-scoped excluded by default).
Bulk prefix-rename a scope across every matching engram (atomic).
Reconcile user-suggested scopes against the known vocabulary.
Validate a single scope string; returns structured errors on failure.

get.summary: List known tags ranked by usage count, optionally filtered by prefix.
List the available engram templates (bodies stripped).
Get a single engram template by name, including its body.
